name: Rolón Donaire
description:
👑 The Monster of Manila 👑

Kengan Ashura

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

↳ Rolón is a tall muscular man with slicked-back, light blond hair. His outfit during the tournament consists of a simple tanktop, dark pants and a pair of sneakers. When it was his turn to fight, he wears only his pants.

↳ He is the reigning King of Purgatory and one of the thirteen representatives who fights in the Kengan Association VS Purgatory Tournament.

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

He looks like a yaoi manga top (⓿_⓿) - K.
creator: Kitae
